### [`v0.4.0`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/asfktz/autodll-webpack-plugin/releases/0.4.0)

[Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/asfktz/autodll-webpack-plugin/compare/0.3.9...0.4.0)

Special thanks to [@​mhheise](https://renovatebot.com/gh/mhheise) & [@​faceyspacey](https://renovatebot.com/gh/faceyspacey) for their work on the webpack 4 support ❤️

#### Features

-   webpack 4 support [#​106](https://renovatebot.com/gh/asfktz/autodll-webpack-plugin/issues/106) 

#### Breaking Changes

-   Removed support for webpack 3 and below. if you need it,  use `0.3.8` instead

Committers:

-   Matt Heise [@​mhheise](https://renovatebot.com/gh/mhheise)
-   James Gillmore [@​faceyspacey](https://renovatebot.com/gh/faceyspacey)
